zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Graham於1125年之後出生在英國蘇格蘭安格斯蒙特洛斯時，他的父親Sir William de Graham Lord of Abercorn and Dalkeith8903歲，母親Lillian Doran8905歲。他於1142年與Isobel Mason在英國蘇格蘭安格斯蒙特洛斯結婚。他去世於1200年在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Graham于1125年之后出生在英国苏格兰安格斯蒙特洛斯时，他的父亲Sir William de Graham Lord of Abercorn and Dalkeith8903岁，母亲Lillian Doran8905岁。他于1142年与Isobel Mason在英国苏格兰安格斯蒙特洛斯结婚。他去世于1200年在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Graham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, recorded in Domesday Book as Graham (as well as Grantham, Grandham, and Granham). See also Grantham .

Irish (especially Ulster): in Ireland Graham is generally the Scottish name, but it has additionally been adopted as an Anglicized form of both Ó Creacháin (see Crehan ) and Ó Gormghaile (see Gormley ).

History: The surname Graham was taken to Scotland at the beginning of the 12th century by the Norman baron William de Graham, holder of the manor of Grantham in Lincolnshire, from whom many if not all modern bearers are probably descended. The chief of Clan Graham is the Duke of Montrose.

variants.name: Greim
meanings: South German: from a short form of a compound personal name beginning with the element grīm ‘mask, helmet’.

variants.name: Grahm
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and northern England): shortened form of   Graham  .

variants.name: Grantham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and East Yorkshire): habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, of uncertain origin. The final element is Old English hām ‘homestead’; the first may be Old English grand ‘gravel’ or perhaps a personal name Granta, which probably originated as a byname meaning ‘snarler’. See also Graham .

variants.name: Grahame
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Graham  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 261, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Graham was born after 1125, in Montrose, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William de Graham Lord of Abercorn and Dalkeith, was 8903 and his mother, Lillian Doran, was 8905. He married Isobel Mason in 1142, in Montrose, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom. He died in 1200, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Graham est né après 1125, à Montrose, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William de Graham Lord of Abercorn and Dalkeith, avait 8903 ans et sa mère, Lillian Doran, avait 8905 ans. Il a épousé Isobel Mason en 1142, à Montrose, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1200, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Graham nach 1125 in Montrose, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Graham Lord of Abercorn and Dalkeith 8903 und seine Mutter Lillian Doran 8905. Er hat 1142 in Montrose, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom Isobel Mason geheiratet. Er starb 1200 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Graham è nato il dopo il 1125 nel Montrose, Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William de Graham Lord of Abercorn and Dalkeith, aveva 8903 anni e il suo madre, Lillian Doran, aveva 8905 anni. Lui sposato Isobel Mason nel 1142, nel Montrose, Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1200, nel sua cittadina.

ko.lifeSummary: John de Graham(이)가 1125년 이후 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 몽로즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Graham Lord of Abercorn and Dalkeith(은)는 8903세였고, 그의 어머니 Lillian Doran(은)는 8905세였다. 그는 1142년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 몽로즈에서 Isobel Mason(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1200년 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Graham nasceu após 1125, em Montrose, Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William de Graham Lord of Abercorn and Dalkeith, tinha 8903 anos e sua mãe, Lillian Doran, tinha 8905 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Graham родился после 1125 г. в местности монтрос, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William de Graham Lord of Abercorn and Dalkeith было 8903 года, а матери, которую звали Lillian Doran, 8905. Он женился на женщине по имени Isobel Mason в 1142 г. в местности монтрос, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1200 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Graham nació después de 1125, en Montrose, Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William de Graham Lord of Abercorn and Dalkeith, tenía 8903 años y su mamá, Lillian Doran, tenía 8905 años. Se casó con Isobel Mason en 1142, en Montrose, Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió en 1200, en su pueblo.
